title: Smoky Japanese Gratin
description: A smoky twist on the classic Japanese dish, with crispy topping and rich flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together crumbled Casabe and French Onion Soup Mix.
In a separate pan, cook diced Smoky Bacon until crispy. Set aside.
In a large baking dish, spread a layer of Cozy Butter.
Add the Casabe mixture on top of the butter, followed by a layer of crispy Bacon.
Sprinkle shredded Gratin Cheese on top of the Bacon.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped Green Onions and serve hot.
